examples.title: Basic rating
examples.description: Five-star rating with whole-star precision and keyboard navigation.
examples.code:
{#if score > 0}

You rated this {score} of 5.

{/if}

examples.title: Half-star precision
examples.description: Five-star rating with half-star steps for finer-grained scores.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { Rating } from 'cinder/rating';
  let score = $state(0);
</script>

<Rating id="half-star-rating" bind:value={score} precision="half" label="Restaurant rating" />

examples.title: Readonly display
examples.description: Non-interactive readonly rating shown alongside a review count.
examples.code: 4.5 (1,238 reviews)
